summary: Fix inner charcoal padding on all dark-mode carousel blocks (DynamicContentCarousel, TestimonialsCarousel, CardsCarousel) to match Figma: 72px on mobile, 92px on desktop. Currently only ~16px/32px. Solution: split the combined `before:-inset-` shorthand into separate x/y axes, add vertical padding to the container (py-10 md:py-15 = 40px/60px), and set vertical pseudo inset to a consistent 32px (before:-inset-y-8). Math: 40+32=72 mobile, 60+32=92 desktop.

fileChanges.description: Split pseudo `before:-inset-` into separate x/y, add container vertical padding
fileChanges.details:
Change the container div classes from:
  `container relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8`
to:
  `container relative py-10 md:py-15 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8`

Key changes:
1. Added `py-10 md:py-15` (40px / 60px vertical padding to container)
2. Split `before:-inset-(--side-gutter)` into `before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8`
3. Split `md:before:-inset-8` into `md:before:-inset-x-8` (vertical already set by before:-inset-y-8)

Result: Inner charcoal padding = container py (40/60) + pseudo inset-y (32) = 72px mobile / 92px desktop

fileChanges.description: Mirror PHP changes in editor component - split pseudo inset and add container padding
fileChanges.details:
Change the container div className from:
  `container relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8`
to:
  `container relative py-10 md:py-15 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8`

fileChanges.description: Split pseudo `before:-inset-` into separate x/y, add container vertical padding (conditional on darkMode)
fileChanges.details:
Change the container div dark-mode classes from:
  `relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8`
to:
  `relative py-10 md:py-15 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8`

Note: CardsCarousel conditionally applies dark-mode classes based on $darkMode attribute. The `py-10 md:py-15` should be part of the conditional dark-mode classes so it only applies when dark mode is active.

fileChanges.description: Mirror PHP changes in editor component - split pseudo inset and add container padding (conditional on darkMode)
fileChanges.details:
Change the container div dark-mode conditional classes from:
  `relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8`
to:
  `relative py-10 md:py-15 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8`

fileChanges.description: Update the dark-mode pattern documentation to reflect the new inner padding approach
fileChanges.details:
Update the pattern doc to use the new split-inset approach with container vertical padding:
- Content Wrapper section: change `before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-gap-6 md:before:-inset-x-8 md:before:-inset-y-gap-8` to `py-10 md:py-15 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8`
- Update the classes breakdown table
- Update all code examples
- Note: the pattern doc currently references `gap-6`/`gap-8` inset-y values that don't match what the carousel blocks actually use. The new pattern standardizes everything.

designDecisions.decision: Use container padding + pseudo inset combination to achieve target inner charcoal padding
designDecisions.evidence: User specified 72px mobile / 92px desktop inner padding. Using py-10 (40px) + before:-inset-y-8 (32px) = 72px mobile, py-15 (60px) + before:-inset-y-8 (32px) = 92px desktop. The md: breakpoint (960px) triggers the py-15 and the inset-y-8 is consistent across breakpoints.

designDecisions.decision: Split the combined before:-inset- shorthand into separate -inset-x- and -inset-y- values
designDecisions.evidence: Horizontal insets stay as-is (--side-gutter mobile / 32px desktop) while vertical insets need different values to accommodate container padding. Splitting axes is required.

designDecisions.decision: Keep section py-10 sm:py-16 (40px/64px) inter-block spacing unchanged
designDecisions.evidence: The section padding provides inter-block spacing and should not change. With pseudo extending 32px vertically, the visible gap between adjacent charcoal panels = 2*(section py - 32) = 16px mobile / 64px desktop, which is acceptable.

designDecisions.decision: Use standard Tailwind spacing tokens py-10 and md:py-15 rather than arbitrary values
designDecisions.evidence: py-10 = 40px, py-15 = 60px are standard Tailwind v4 spacing values (spacing * 10 = 2.5rem = 40px, spacing * 15 = 3.75rem = 60px). No arbitrary [Xpx] values needed.

designDecisions.decision: DynamicContentCarousel and TestimonialsCarousel are always dark, so classes are applied unconditionally. CardsCarousel has a darkMode toggle, so classes remain conditional.
designDecisions.evidence: DynamicContentCarousel.php and TestimonialsCarousel.php hardcode `dark bg-transparent!` on the section. CardsCarousel.php conditionally applies based on $darkMode attribute. This existing pattern is preserved.
